creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
Try submission again.

I am the ports maintainer for p5-Mail-SpamAssassin.
Sorry if I am doing something wrong, or if ports are still half-frozen, 
let me know.

Issue with p5-Compress-Zlib was fixed with unfrozen ports major update, 
thanks.

I have attempted to submit update to SpamAssassin 3.18 to 3.20.
This is a MAJOR performance, features and security update, and I am 
getting emails every day asking when this will be released.

If these patches are too big, you can rm -rf p5-Mail-SpamAssassin and 
untar this:  http://www.secnap.com/downloads/sa320.tgz

It does not REQUIRE, but also would be helpful if re2c is also updated 
also.  (I sent in patches on 5/07: pr 112501)
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/112501

Fix: Remove one patch file: patch-sa-learn-raw

Add two new files: patch-ImageInfo.pm, patch-sa-compile.raw
How-To-Repeat:   See http://spamassassin.apache.org for release announcement.
